rules.title: Reject non-positive capacity
rules.condition: capacity is not a positive integer
rules.raw:
R1 - Reject non-positive capacity
When capacity is not a positive integer, the TokenBucket constructor MUST raise ValueError.

rules.title: Default tokens to capacity
rules.condition: tokens_available is omitted or None at construction

obligations.text: MUST return tokens_available equal to capacity

rules.raw:
R2 - Default tokens to capacity
When tokens_available is omitted or None at construction, the TokenBucket MUST return tokens_available equal to capacity.

rules.title: Successful consume reduces tokens
rules.condition: consume is called with requested_tokens less than or equal to current tokens_available

value.target: True and tokens_available equal to prior tokens_available minus requested_tokens

obligations.text: MUST return True and tokens_available equal to prior tokens_available minus requested_tokens

rules.raw:
R3 - Successful consume reduces tokens
When consume is called with requested_tokens less than or equal to current tokens_available, the TokenBucket MUST return True and tokens_available equal to prior tokens_available minus requested_tokens.

rules.title: Failed consume preserves state
rules.condition: consume is called with requested_tokens greater than current tokens_available
rules.raw:
R4 - Failed consume preserves state
When consume is called with requested_tokens greater than current tokens_available, the TokenBucket MUST return False and MUST NOT mutate tokens_available.

rules.title: Refill capped at capacity
rules.condition: refill is called with a non-negative amount

obligations.text: MUST NOT return tokens_available greater than capacity

rules.raw:
R5 - Refill capped at capacity
When refill is called with a non-negative amount, the TokenBucket MUST NOT return tokens_available greater than capacity.

rules.title: Refill adds tokens below cap
rules.condition: refill is called with amount such that prior tokens_available plus amount is less than or equal to capacity

value.target: tokens_available equal to prior tokens_available plus amount

obligations.text: MUST return tokens_available equal to prior tokens_available plus amount

rules.raw:
R6 - Refill adds tokens below cap
When refill is called with amount such that prior tokens_available plus amount is less than or equal to capacity, the TokenBucket MUST return tokens_available equal to prior tokens_available plus amount.
